sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (event_time DateTime, interval_length IntervalMillisecond);
UPDATE test_intervals SET interval_length = toIntervalMillisecond(5000) WHERE event_time = toDateTime('2024-06-15 12:00:00');
SELECT event_time + interval_length AS new_event_time FROM test_intervals;
DELETE FROM test_intervals WHERE event_time < toDateTime('2024-06-15');
